title: Kaizen! Slightly more instant
description: Gerhard discusses Kaizen 12 improvements: moving from S3 to Cloudflare R2 reduced AWS costs from $155 to under $17/month, enabling HTTP/3 and Brotli compression, fixing S3 caching, implementing WebSockets through Fastly, and migrating Changelog Nightly to Fly.io.
